title: Cleaning and sterilizing Droso-Plugs for Drosophila maintenance
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3g6ah","text":"Genesee Scientific's Droso-Plugs provide a reusable, washable, and autoclavable solution for sealing Drosophila vials. This protocol outlines our lab's procedure for cleaning and sterilizing Droso-Plugs. While these plugs can be reused multiple times, we have observed that they may shrink with repeated cleanings and autoclaving cycles. Therefore, we recommend using each plug only twice before disposal.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":101,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4rpki","text":"This protocol involves the use of various chemicals and reagents that require careful handling and strict adherence to safety guidelines to ensure safe laboratory practices. Please review the Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) for each reagent before beginning the protocol and take appropriate precautions. All steps should be performed while wearing gloves, a lab coat, and eye protection. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Plug the drain of the lab sink.
Fill the sink with warm tap water. Generously squirt 1 % (v/v) Liquinox into the water as the sink fills.
Gently rub away dirt and debris from the Droso-Plugs by hand.
Plug the drain of the lab sink and fill with warm tap water.
Place Droso-Plugs in a pitcher and fill with diH 2 O to rinse off tap water.
Squeeze excess diH 2 O from Droso-Plugs and place in a single layer on a drying rack.
Place clean and dry Droso-Plugs in Autoclave Bags, 2 to 3 gal. Fisher Scientific Catalog #01-826-5 . Add a strip of Autoclave Tape Fisher Scientific Catalog #15-901-111 to the bag.
Place the autoclave bag filled with Droso-Plugs in an autoclave-safe pan or dish. Keep the neck of the autoclave bag open for steam release. Failure to do so will cause the bag to explode.
Autoclave the Droso-plugs on a liquid cycle. The manufacturer recommended autoclave settings are 00:15:00 at 121 °C and 15 psi .
Remove bag from the autoclave and lay flat on lab bench surface with neck of bag open for the Droso-Plugs to dry Overnight .
Once plugs are dry, tie the top of the bag and label the bag with the date and your initials.
Transfer dirty Droso-Plugs, narrow vials Genesee Scientific Catalog #59-200 into the sink.
Unplug the sink and allow to drain. While draining, rinse off any leftover dirt or debris from the plugs by hand.
Unplug the sink and allow to drain. Gently squeeze the Droso-Plugs to remove excess tap water.
creator: J. Dylan Shropshire
